tasks.description: Run smart checkup using 8 collection scripts, generate 10-dimension traffic-light analysis with progressive disclosure report and fix suggestions
tasks.input: Run a health diagnostic on this OpenClaw Agent installation. Check all 10 dimensions and provide a report with fix suggestions for any issues found.

scoring.5: Executes 8 collection scripts (env, config, logs, skills, health, precheck, channels, tools); saves to data/checkups/; outputs valid JSON; handles failures gracefully
scoring.3: Executes 5-7 collection scripts; some outputs parsed correctly
scoring.1: Only 1-4 scripts executed or manual data gathering used
scoring.0: No script execution; data fabricated or missing

scoring.5: Uses score-calculator.sh with 10 dimensions; each dimension independently judged as ‚úÖ/‚ö†ÔłŹ/‚ĚĆ; overall status follows rule (has ‚ĚĆ‚Üí‚ĚĆ, has ‚ö†ÔłŹ‚Üí‚ö†ÔłŹ, all ‚úÖ‚Üí‚úÖ); evidence per dimension
scoring.3: Some dimensions analyzed but not all 10; traffic-light model partially applied
scoring.0: No analysis or incorrect model (e.g., still using percentage scores)

scoring.5: Report follows L0‚ÜíL1‚ÜíL2 format: one-line status with counts, 2-row dimension grid, issues table for ‚ö†ÔłŹ/‚ĚĆ only; clean hierarchy
scoring.3: Basic report with some levels but missing grid or issue table

scoring.5: Checkup data saved to data/checkups/YYYY-MM-DD-HHmmss/ with all JSON files + analysis.json; latest symlink updated; history browsable
scoring.3: Data partially saved; missing some files or no symlink

scoring.5: For each ‚ö†ÔłŹ/‚ĚĆ dimension, suggests fix with reference to fix-playbooks.md; prompt to run --fix; issues sorted by severity
scoring.3: Some suggestions but missing playbook references or severity ordering
